title: Thai Larb Bread Bowl
description: A twist on the classic Thai dish, served in a crispy bread bowl. The combination of flavors and textures is sure to impress.
instructions: Slice the Thai bread into 1-inch thick rounds and toast until crispy.
In a large skillet, cook the ground pork over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the larb seasoning mix, fish sauce, and lime juice to the skillet and stir to combine.
Continue cooking for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the flavors have melded together.
Spoon the larb mixture into the toasted bread bowls.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
